svg.text: history_qpos[0, t] = root_pos (x, y, z), root_rot (qw, qx, qy, qz), 29 joint angles (rad)
qpos[0, t] = x, y, z, qw, qx, qy, qz, 29 joint angles (rad)
num_pred_frames : scalar, only qpos[0, :4*num_pred_frames] are valid (min 0.8s, max 2.1s)
Paper mentions 2.4 s — mistake. Theoretically bounded to 2.1s, C++ code bounds to ≈ 1.47 s.
• qpos@30 Hz → linearly interpolated to 50 Hz
10 future qpos and vel @ 0.1 s (1.0 s ahead)
